headline: Northern Trust Asset Management Launches Sustainable Multifactor Funds
summary: LONDON, June 11, 2026--Northern Trust Asset Management, a leading global investment manager with US$1.4 trillion in assets under management (as of March 31, 2026), today announced the launch of two actively managed UCITS funds, designed to pursue outperformance while efficiently managing climate transition-related risks and opportunities.
